title: alyssum doerfleri
intro: Alyssum doerfleri, also known as doerfleri's alyssum, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin issues such as acne, eczema, and wounds, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of alyssum doerfleri include its ability to reduce stress, promote relaxation, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, alyssum doerfleri is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
